ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lineages" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage */,
  "lineage_name" TEXT /* Name of the lineage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lineage */,
  "WHO_label" TEXT /* WHO label for the lineage */,
  "PANGO_lineage" TEXT /* PANGO lineage designation */,
  "clade" TEXT /* Clade classification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the lineage was first identified */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the lineage was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineage associated with the report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the cases were reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the cases were reported */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "hospitalization_count" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations reported */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths reported */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was first created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_lineage_id FOREIGN KEY ("lineage_id") REFERENCES lineages ("lineage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineage associated with the sequence */,
  "sequence_data" TEXT /* Genomic sequencing data */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequencing (e.g., WGS, targeted) */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number for the sequence */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was first uploaded */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_sequences_lineage_id FOREIGN KEY ("lineage_id") REFERENCES lineages ("lineage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was first created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_analysis_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, healthcare organization) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was first created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., report, sequence data) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access event was first recorded */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution */,
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineage associated with the distribution */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the cases were reported */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the cases were reported */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the cases reported */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the cases reported */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the distribution was first created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the distribution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_distribution_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_distribution_lineage_id FOREIGN KEY ("lineage_id") REFERENCES lineages ("lineage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineage associated with the trend */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the cases were reported */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the cases were reported */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was first created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_trends_lineage_id FOREIGN KEY ("lineage_id") REFERENCES lineages ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new case, new lineage) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was first created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
